data.body: PREPLANNING_CONTEXT_LIGHTWEIGHT: {"version":1,"epicId":"3c67-d8cf","generatedAt":"2026-04-15T21:18:03.467622+00:00","generatedBy":"preplanning_lightweight","epic":{"title":"architect-foundation --auto: fully non-interactive enforcement scaffolding","description":"Remove 3 confirmation gates from --auto code path in architect-foundation/SKILL.md, replacing each with automatic selection of the recommended default and a logged summary.","successCriteria":["--auto runs to completion without user prompts \u2014 verified by scripted fixture: no stdin reads, ARCH_ENFORCEMENT.md produced, at least one ADR in docs/adr/","All decisions use recommended defaults; output documents choices made","Artifacts identical in structure to interactive mode when user accepts all defaults"]},"stories":[],"storyDashboard":{"totalStories":0,"uiStories":0,"criticalPath":[]},"doneDefinitions":["When complete, --auto runs to completion without user prompts on fixture project (no stdin reads, ARCH_ENFORCEMENT.md produced, ADR in docs/adr/)","When complete, all 3 gates replaced with auto-selected defaults and logged summaries","When complete, --auto artifacts structurally identical to interactive mode (verified by diff)"],"considerations":["[Reliability] Silent default selection \u2014 must check dso-config.conf for conflicts and surface them in output log","[Testing] Scripted fixture must verify no stdin reads (redirect stdin from /dev/null, verify exit 0)","[Maintainability] 3 gate locations must be precisely identified before modification"],"mode":"lightweight","complexityOverride":null}
